channel.title: Allan Batac Portfolio Changelog
channel.description: Stay updated with the latest improvements, fixes, and milestones of Allan Batac's portfolio.

item.title: v2.6.2 - Versioning & Source Control Update
item.description: • Versioning & Source Control: Added a dedicated section to showcase experience across Git, GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, and SVN version control systems.

item.title: v2.6.1 - Summary & Skills Update
item.description:
• Summary & Skills Update: Enhanced professional summary and technical skill sets to highlight expertise in modern hosting platforms (Vercel, Netlify, Cloudflare), RAG, and System Design Documents (SDD).
  • Metadata Optimization: Refreshed SEO keywords for better discoverability.

item.title: v2.6.0 - Static UI Refresh
item.description:
• Static Portfolio Refresh: Updated typography, layout, and project cards for a cleaner resume-style experience.
  • Pure HTML/CSS Delivery: Removed JavaScript-powered controls and analytics from deployed pages.
  • Project Additions: Added Mekeni, Pixel IQ, FOSSY, and WPEG.app.
  • Cleaner Structure: Removed the stale duplicate app implementation so the static site remains the source of truth.

item.title: v2.5.0 - UI Polish & Project Documentation
item.description:
• UI Polishing: Refined the profile layout by centering the avatar for a more balanced and professional header.
  • Enhanced Discovery: Launched the unified changelog and project documentation system.
  • Live Updates: Integrated an RSS feed allowing followers to subscribe to real-time project milestones.
  • SEO Optimization: Updated search engine directives to ensure better visibility of the new project tracking system.

item.title: v1.0.0 - Professional Brand & Design Refresh
item.description:
• Professional Brand: Introduced the "Business Summary" section to showcase strategic and leadership competencies.
  • Design Refresh: Migrated to a modern icon system using Google Material Symbols for a sleeker look.
  • Version Control: Implemented the initial version tracking system and checkpoint methodology.
  • Legacy Alignment: Updated the copyright structure for 2026 and cleaned up dynamic year handling for better performance.
